name: cross-observing
prompt: Medium shot woman with severe black bob in dark administrative corridor. Vivid red lipstick. Arms crossed, leaning against wall. Watching through window at distant warm glow. Observing without being seen. Cold blue moonlight on her face. Noir atmosphere. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic noir lighting, dark blue grey color palette, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Cross
dialogue.text: They're all making the same mistake I made.

bubble: Internal thought from Cross, medium shot face visible, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue
